changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql: alter table config.configurations drop constraint if exists ck_application;

alter table config.configurations add constraint ck_application check ( application in ( 'pod', 'ppt', 'ppm', 'dispatcher', 'executor', 'analyzer', 'report_generator', 'report_scheduler', 'config_server'));

rollback.sql: alter table config.configurations add constraint ck_application check ( application in ( 'pod', 'ppt', 'ppm', 'dispatcher', 'executor', 'analyzer', 'report_generator', 'report_scheduler'));
